name: craft-docs
title: Craft Docs
description: Manage Craft Docs from Raycast — quick notes, daily notes, tasks, search, and more.
author: your-raycast-username

commands.name: quick-note
commands.title: Quick Note
commands.description: Create an instant note in Craft

preferences.name: defaultFolderId
preferences.title: Default Folder ID
preferences.description: Folder ID to save quick notes in (leave empty for Unsorted). Find it via Search Documents.

commands.name: daily-note
commands.title: Append to Daily Note
commands.description: Add a bullet or block to today's Craft daily note

commands.name: open-daily-note
commands.title: Open Daily Note
commands.description: View today's or a previous day's daily note in Raycast

commands.name: view-tasks
commands.title: View Tasks
commands.description: Browse, filter, complete, or delete Craft tasks

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.description: Create a new task in Craft

commands.name: search-documents
commands.title: Search Documents
commands.description: Search across all Craft documents with folder and date filters

commands.name: add-to-list
commands.title: Add to List
commands.description: Append content to a pinned Craft document (grocery list, ideas, etc.)

commands.name: scratchpad
commands.title: Craft Scratchpad
commands.description: A persistent scratchpad that saves to Craft Docs

preferences.name: docsSecretLinkId
preferences.title: Documents API Secret Link ID
preferences.description: Secret link ID from Craft Settings → API → All Documents. Format: a long alphanumeric string.

preferences.name: tasksSecretLinkId
preferences.title: Daily Notes & Tasks API Secret Link ID
preferences.description: Secret link ID from Craft Settings → API → Daily Notes and Tasks.
